title: Op call (command plane request)
description: One envelope for every mutation in the lab. Humans and agents call the identical op (named-op symmetry). Audit commits to the lake BEFORE the effect is acknowledged; if the audit write fails, the op does not run.

id.description: Client-minted idempotency key; re-send after network failure is safe.

op.description: Namespaced op name from ops.json (agent.restart, task.claim, attention.resolve, ...).

args.description: Op-specific arguments; typed per ops.json entry.

reason.description: Audited verbatim; required by ops that declare requires_reason (task.close, item.delete, edge.key.revoke, ...).
